response.justification: Bogdan is a capable generalist full-stack engineer with strong fundamentals, high-throughput systems exposure, and a broad language portfolio, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core requirements of this role: there is no evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics system design, or statistical analysis for experiment quality and bias detection. The role demands a Principal-level IC with deep specialization in growth and measurement systems; the candidate's trajectory is senior/staff generalist. The Sociomantic role hints at scale, but throughput engineering for ad serving is not experimentation platform engineering. AI tooling work at re:cinq is a mild positive signal but insufficient to offset the experimentation gap.
strengths: Demonstrated high-scale, low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Broad language portfolio (JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, Java, DLang, C#) covering most required languages
Evidence of AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contributions at re:cinq, showing adaptability to modern AI-first stacks
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment/targeting, or rollout-risk management anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or data analysis background; the role requires high data aptitude and statistical methods proficiency

Seniority gap: the role is Principal/IC6 with cross-team platform ownership; the candidate's record is individual senior/staff contributor on product teams without evidence of multi-team systemic influence

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
